_comment_: CB_LABYRINTH (Pyrcz 2004) — connected-but-jigsaw labyrinthine channel-belt architecture; medium NTG, low-sinuosity channels with rare avulsion, prominent abandoned-mud plugs giving the labyrinth signature. See header of config_full_pv_shoestring.json for the comment-tag convention used here ('skip — preset default' / 'skip — class default' / 'VARIED').

grid._comment_dx_: dx=dy=10m, dz=1m. CB-labyrinth channels are ~64m wide -> 6-7 cells. Migration step ~25m -> 2.5 cells/event.

preset._comment_: Pyrcz 2004 labyrinthine architecture. Locks rest of kwargs to CB_LABYRINTH baseline unless overridden below.

NTGtarget._comment_: VARIED. CB-labyrinth NTG range — medium NTG, baseline 0.25.

mCHsinu._comment_: VARIED. Mean sinuosity. Baseline 1.3 (low — that's the labyrinth signature: jigsaw-like compartments).

mCHwdratio._comment_: VARIED. CB-labyrinth W:D. Wider than PV but still bounded by labyrinth signature.

mCHdepth._comment_: VARIED. Channel depth (m). Range [3, 10] keeps deep stacks below half of z_len so several levels still fit (nlevel auto-tunes inversely).

probAvulInside._comment_: VARIED. Low in-belt avulsion is the labyrinth signature (channels stay connected). Baseline 0.05.

mFFCHprop._comment_: VARIED. Abandoned-channel mud-plug fraction. Widened to [0.1, 0.55] for visual variability.

mdistMigrate._comment_: VARIED. Migration distance per event. Baseline 25.

azimuth._comment_: VARIED. Flow direction (deg, clockwise from +x). Channels are not 180-symmetric so the full circle matters.

nlevel._comment_: AUTO. nlevel = clip(50 / mCHdepth, 2, 12). Deeper channels stack fewer levels; shallower stack more — basin always full.

ntime._comment_: per-level event budget (75 events × nlevel total). Sized so each level fills with the preset's typical channel density.

ntime_per_level._comment_: TRUE so every level gets its own event budget (independent of how many lower levels consumed). Without this, deep levels starve when NTGtarget=0.99 stops never firing.

probAvulOutside._comment_: skip — preset default. CB_LABYRINTH overrides class 0.10 -> 0.05 (rare out-of-belt jumps).

stdevCHsinu._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.15 -> 0.1 (tighter sinuosity distribution).

stdevCHwdratio._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 2.0.

stdevdistMigrate._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 10 -> 8.

mLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 1.0 -> 0.5.

stdevLVdepth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.2 -> 0.1.

mLVwidth._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 40 -> 30.

mLVheight._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.5 -> 0.3.

mCSnum._comment_: splays disabled — adds visual complexity without diagnostic value; future versions can re-enable.

stdevFFCHprop._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.0 -> 0.15.

mNeckFFCHprop._comment_: skip — preset default (also class default). Neck-cutoff oxbow mud plug only useful for MEANDER_OXBOW.

Cf._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 0.0078 -> 0.0036.

scour_factor._comment_: skip — preset default. Override of class 2.0 -> 10.0.
